'''竏嗾-dh-l-j''' ('''katadhlejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:weighten|weighten]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-dh-l-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weighten|weighten]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗾-dh-l-j
|-
! Lemma
| katadhlejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitadhlejoko|thitadhlejoko]] || [[word:jitadhlejoko|jitadhlejoko]] || [[word:shitadhlejoko|shitadhlejoko]] || [[word:kitadhlejoko|kitadhlejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutadhlejoko|thuthutadhlejoko]] || [[word:jujutadhlejoko|jujutadhlejoko]] || [[word:shushutadhlejoko|shushutadhlejoko]] || [[word:kukutadhlejoko|kukutadhlejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutadhlejoko|thutadhlejoko]] || [[word:jutadhlejoko|jutadhlejoko]] || [[word:shutadhlejoko|shutadhlejoko]] || [[word:kutadhlejoko|kutadhlejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutadhlejoko|thutadhlejoko]] || [[word:jutadhlejoko|jutadhlejoko]] || [[word:shutadhlejoko|shutadhlejoko]] || [[word:kutadhlejoko|kutadhlejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetadhlejoko|thetadhlejoko]] || [[word:jetadhlejoko|jetadhlejoko]] || [[word:shetadhlejoko|shetadhlejoko]] || [[word:ketadhlejoko|ketadhlejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotadhlejoko|thothotadhlejoko]] || [[word:jojotadhlejoko|jojotadhlejoko]] || [[word:shoshotadhlejoko|shoshotadhlejoko]] || [[word:kokotadhlejoko|kokotadhlejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotadhlejoko|thotadhlejoko]] || [[word:jotadhlejoko|jotadhlejoko]] || [[word:shotadhlejoko|shotadhlejoko]] || [[word:kotadhlejoko|kotadhlejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotadhlejoko|thotadhlejoko]] || [[word:jotadhlejoko|jotadhlejoko]] || [[word:shotadhlejoko|shotadhlejoko]] || [[word:kotadhlejoko|kotadhlejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦtadhlejoko|thﾃｦtadhlejoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦtadhlejoko|jﾃｦtadhlejoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦtadhlejoko|shﾃｦtadhlejoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦtadhlejoko|kﾃｦtadhlejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatadhlejoko|thathatadhlejoko]] || [[word:jajatadhlejoko|jajatadhlejoko]] || [[word:shashatadhlejoko|shashatadhlejoko]] || [[word:kakatadhlejoko|kakatadhlejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatadhlejoko|thatadhlejoko]] || [[word:jatadhlejoko|jatadhlejoko]] || [[word:shatadhlejoko|shatadhlejoko]] || [[word:katadhlejoko|katadhlejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatadhlejoko|thatadhlejoko]] || [[word:jatadhlejoko|jatadhlejoko]] || [[word:shatadhlejoko|shatadhlejoko]] || [[word:katadhlejoko|katadhlejoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shatadhlejithi|shatadhlejithi]] || [[word:shatadhlejiji|shatadhlejiji]] || [[word:shatadhlejishi|shatadhlejishi]] || [[word:shatadhlejiki|shatadhlejiki]]
|-

|-

|}
